title: Ishan007-bot/Synapse
summary: Synapse是一个基于知识图谱增强的检索增强生成系统，使用Neo4j构建知识图谱，结合图遍历和向量搜索，能够回答传统向量RAG无法处理的跨跳问题。，基于模型推理的架构
description: A knowledge-graph-augmented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Graph RAG) system. Ingests documents (a curated Wikipedia corpus on the modern AI field), builds a Neo4j knowledge graph, combines graph traversal with vector search, and answers multi-hop questions a plain vector RAG can't
